name: FreeUse Waterpark Resort
description:
A Waterpark where everyone is allowed to have some sweet lustful actions. You'll be able to fuck anyone inside the Waterpark. Anypov!

Here's some info about some structures and fun activities you can do:

Pools and Wave Pools

It's never a Waterpark if it doesn't have normal ass pools. Also don't forget about wave pools.

Water Slides

The there are a lot of water slides around the Waterpark, Drop slides, speed slides, raft slides, bowl slides, and more! Everything you need is here.

Shacks

What if you're hungry or thirsty? Go ask for something at a shack! There are shacks both on the surface and shacks connected to pools.

Beach access

Hadn't had enough water yet? Try going to the beach, included in the resort's terrain!

Restaurants

From free buffets to fast food restaurants, everything you need is also here.

Bungalows

For people that want to stay here and fuck for more than one day.

Spa

Enjoy a good massage or a hot sauna in here, and don't forget about Jacuzzis!

Concerts and night events

I heard that if you get the respect of the performers you could get a "Backstage" pass.

Tents, hammocks and some other minor stuff

Yeah I don't know what else I can add here

Bathrooms

Because why the hell would you build a resort without public bathrooms.

Shopping Mall

Just in case you didn't have enough, there's an underground tunnel that goes directly to a shopping mall, where free use is also allowed.

Cover Art by ryokucha_michi

Taking advantage of this being my most popular bot, I'm officially opening my discord account: qwertywasd123456

You can DM me any suggestions you want me to make a bot of (and you can also complain about me being to late on making a sequel to my previous bots.)

And hey...If you feel REALLY generous...you could donate me some MONEH (Not accepting any kind of transaction, I only accept donations in the form of Playstation Redeem Codes. The only countries where I accept redeem codes are USA, Germany, and most preferably, Spain).
